case_title: JANETTE JOLLY VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION, INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A et al

docket_entries.description: THIS CASE IS DEEMED AN INCLUDED ACTION IN THE REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631, PURSUANT TO ORDER DESIGNATING POTENTIAL ADD-ON CASES AS INCLUDED CASES, DATED OCT-14-2010

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOLLY, JANETTE AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION, INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A NORTHSTAR RX LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FIRST DATA BANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION WYETH PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A ESI LEDERLE, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION PFIZER, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION UCB GMBH D/B/A SCHWARZ PHARMA AG, A FOREIGN CORPORATION ALAVEN PHARMACEUTICAL LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION MORTON GROVE PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-14-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-30-2010 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING RE MOTION TO STRIKE SET FOR DEC-23-2010, IN DEPT. 304, IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE MOVING PARTY'S REQUEST. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 304.
FEE FOR STIPULATION TO EXTEND THE TIME PERIOD TO FILE AN ANSWER TO MONDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2010 FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST DATABANK, INC.
